prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (6.2L HEMI SRT engine code: ESF) with a 3.0L rotor set, increasing boost from 12 psi to 18 psi, paired with a Kenne Bell Boost-a-Pump to maintain fuel pressure at 75 psi under full load

Full billet aluminum fuel system overhaul using Fore Innovations 450 LPH dual-pump fuel system with -8AN feed and return lines, integrated with a Radium Engineering port injection kit utilizing 10x ID1000 injectors for E85 compatibility

Custom camshaft profile by Comp Cams (PN: 279H-14) with 0.636" lift, 248°/254° duration, and 114° lobe separation, paired with a Brian Tooley Racing Stage 3 valvetrain kit including beehive springs, titanium retainers, and chromoly pushrods
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Dodge Performance Parts (DPP) Hellcat Redeye Extreme Widebody kit (PN: 68410858AA), extending fenders by 3.5" and adding carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes

Custom forged aluminum wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (FF17 model, 20x11 front / 20x12 rear) with a satin black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30R20 front, 325/30R20 rear) for maximum lateral grip

Full carbon fiber aero package by Anderson Composites, including a GT3-style rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm chord) with integrated Gurney flap, carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors, and rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts
